breaking_news_suggestions.headline: 7 Predictions Expire April 30 — Dome Silent on PRED-105 After 11 Days
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: PRED-105 (46° copper coils, 14-day window) closed April 18 with no dome response after 11 days. Six more predictions (PRED-106 plus five others) all carry April 30 EOM windows. If dome silently ignores all seven, that's the strongest pipeline-failure pattern to date.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: N=7 simultaneous window closures after N=1 (PRED-105) already silent — potential landmark multi-prediction dropout event.
